name: f1-fantasy-api-data

scripts.deploy:aci: az deployment group create --resource-group f1-fantazy-bot --template-file infra/aci/azuredeploy.json --parameters @infra/aci/azuredeploy.parameters.json
scripts.deploy:runner: az deployment group create --resource-group f1-fantazy-bot --template-file infra/runner/azuredeploy.json --parameters @infra/runner/azuredeploy.parameters.json
scripts.deploy:scheduler: az deployment group create --resource-group f1-fantazy-bot --template-file infra/scheduler/azuredeploy.json --parameters @infra/scheduler/azuredeploy.parameters.json
scripts.deploy:logicapps: npm run deploy:runner && npm run deploy:scheduler

author: Doron Kilzi
description: Fetches F1 Fantasy league data via Playwright and saves to Azure Blob Storage
